caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain and 25 kt Trades Impact Roatan Today
caribbean.paragraph: Roatan is experiencing sustained ENE trade winds near 25 kt with seas to 6.3 ft on a 10 s ENE swell and 100% rain probability. I recommend a Small Craft Advisory for Roatan given the sustained 25 kt winds, and I note Grand Cayman will see lighter trades near 17 kt with lower seas.

mediterranean.headline: Northeasterly swell near Mykonos; winds to 22 kt
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing northeasterly (NNE) swell with sustained winds of 22 kt, significant wave heights near 4.8 ft and a 6 s swell period, and less than 10% rain probability. I note Cadiz is much calmer with winds around 12 kt, and I advise small craft to exercise caution offshore of Mykonos given the 22 kt winds and 4.8 ft seas.
